hero.title: Ibero-American Network
hero.subtitle: of Research
hero.description: We strengthen collegiate, organized and systematic research, driving educational innovation and comprehensive university development across Ibero-America.

highlights.title: What do we do?
highlights.subtitle: We drive multidisciplinary research as an engine of social and educational transformation.

items.title: Collegiate Research
items.description: A vital process that stems from the interests and motivations of diverse areas of knowledge.

items.title: Educational Innovation
items.description: Strengthening curricula and comprehensive university education across multiple disciplines.

items.title: Ibero-American Network
items.description: International collaboration among members and collaborators from across Ibero-America.

vision.description: In the coming years, the RII Network will be recognized as the most influential technological research ecosystem in Ibero-America, leading the creation of applied knowledge and forming strategic alliances that drive scientific, ethical and social development.

caiseb.title: CAISEB 2026
caiseb.description: Coming Soon — International Academic Congress on Innovation in Health, Education and Wellness

presence.title: Discover our presence in Ibero-America
presence.description: Explore the institutions, researchers and projects that are part of the Ibero-American Research Network across the entire region.

updates.description: Stay connected with the scientific progress of the Network. From milestones in our latest research to the agenda of upcoming events.
updates.question: What would you like to explore today?
updates.newsDescription: Discover the latest achievements, publications and agreements from our academic community.
updates.eventsDescription: Secure your spot at webinars, workshops and the official road to the new CAISEB.
updates.memberLink: Contribute news or propose an event

contacto.title: Contact Us
contacto.description: Do you have a question or want to collaborate with the Ibero-American Research Network? Fill out the form and we will get in touch with you.
contacto.success: ✅ Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
